title: Create: Old Timey Copper
description: Reverts create copper textures to the ones before v6.0.0
body:
[![RubyHost Partnership](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/734de55b9d68de8d0d141c95b975144be608660a_0.webp)](https://billing.rubyhost.net/aff.php?aff=22)

Are you one of the many that hated the new Create copper textures? Want to go back but there's no programmer art? Create: Old Timey Copper reverts the changes, giving you back that look of classic pre-v6 update.

All textures and models were made by the Create dev team, i simply ported them back as many people begged for a resourcepack like this.

[![Create Tank Defenses Discord Server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48e65690b4f8c2652ff461fa73001975450d072d_0.webp)](https://discord.com/invite/9DAyXxr7MC)
